problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
